notes: Thin discharge file: constructs the concrete base-changed isogeny (1−π)_{K̄} via Isogeny.mkBaseChange, bundles all CoordHom-free geometric residuals into OneSubScalingData, and derives OneSubFrobeniusScaling via weilScales_of_dualComp. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides, no proof exceeds 20 lines. Three theorems (pullback simp, degree-finrank reduction, toAddMonoidHom_eq_baseChange) are unused within the file and serve as API for downstream callers.
